Vietnamese Legal RAG Strategy Benchmark

Compare four member strategies on the shared 5-query benchmark.
Model: AITeamVN/Vietnamese_Embedding
Ready. First run can take several minutes while embeddings are cached.

Members And Strategies

Benchmark Questions

Select one or more prepared benchmark questions.

Chat Question

Optional: type one extra question. The selected source filter helps compare strategies.

Ranking

Run the benchmark to see the best strategy.
Score is normalized to 100: Top-3 25%, Top-1 20%, exact article 25%, keyword coverage 20%, MRR 5%, concise chunk 5%. Article-only matches are not counted as relevant.
# Member Strategy Chunks Top-3 Top-1 Exact Article Coverage Avg Len MRR Score
